titleStmt.title: SII 18.435: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 435. (B.K. No. 16 of 1934-35.) GŌḌIHĀḶ, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Garbhagṛiha of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 159[4], Naḷa, [Pushya] śu. 12. The Saka year given coincided with the cyclic year Prabhava and not Naḷa. In the year Naḷa, the details correspond to A.D. 1677, January 12, Friday.

It records the grant of the village Gāḍehaḷu, to the Vaishṇava pontiff Satyādhiśaśripāda, disciple of Satyabhinava-tīrtha who was the disciple of Satyanātha-Tītha. The grant was made by Lingappa-gauḍa, the Deśayi of Guttāḷal, for the worship of god Srī Ramachandra in the maṭha of the donee.
It may be noted that the date given in the record is too early for the characters in which it is engraved. The palaeography of the record would indicate that it is probably a later copy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmō jayatu
0 .Two strokes are engraved at the beginning ofkarakaḷitāmalakamiva prabhu
ṇā yēnēdamavagataṁ viśvaṁ .
sa jayati janakasutāyāḥ nā(ṁ)
taḥ śrīraghunaṁdanō daivaḥ . nama
stuṁgaśiraścuṁbiccaṁdracāmara
cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamu
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudayanrupaśālivāhanaśa
kavarṣa 1594This looks like the Englishneya naḷanāma
saṁvatsarada puṣya śudha 12 puṇya
kāladallu . śrīmatparamahaṁsapa
rivrājakācāryatvādyanēka
guṇasaṁpaṁnarāda (.) śrīmadvai
ṣṇavasiddhāṁtapratiṣṭhāpanā
cāryarāda śrīrāmacaṁdradē
vara divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka
rāda (.) śrīmatsatyanāthatīrttha śrīpā
daṁgaḷa karakamalasaṁjātarā
da śrīmatsatyābhinavatīrtha śrīpāda
vaḍēru tatkarakamalasaṁjātarāda
śrīmatsatyādhīśa śrīpādasvāmiga
ḷai yyanavara caraṇāraviṁda dvaṁdvagaḷi
ge taṁmma paramānugrahapātrarāda
kātyāyanasūtrada śuklayajuḥśākhe
ya mōnabhārgava gōtrada dēśāyi gutta
ḷala basavaṇagauḍaru putraru hanuma
ṁtagauḍaru tatputraru . liṁgappagauḍa
ru māḍuvā śirasāṣṭāṁgapraṇāmasaha
srapuraḥsara Ativinaya bhaktipūrva
kavāgi barasikoṭṭa grāmadānapaṭṭe
kramaveṁteṁdare . na(ṁ)mma vaṁśapāraṁparā
prāpta samasta pitrugaḷige caturyidhani
śrēyassu . namage sakaḷa puruṣārtthagaḷa
nu Anavarataṁ pūjeyiṁda saṁtuṣṭanāgi (.)
koḍabēkeṁdu svāmigaḷa maṭhada śrīrā
macaṁdradēvara mahā vaibhavadiṁdā
ṣōḍaśōpacārayukta pujeya [Ā]
caṁdrārkavāgi naḍēbēkeṁdu naṁma
dēśāyike yihābage saṁlava gōḍehā
ḷu yeṁba grāmava(ṁ)nnu sayiraṇyōda
kadhārāpūrvvakavāgi . pūrvapramā
ṇa dānamānyayidhayika jala taru
pāṣāṇa nidhinikṣēpa modalā
da sakala [Ārjane] sayitavāgi Uṁ
baḷi koṭu yidēve . yī maṭhada śrī
rāmacaṁdradēvara mahāvaibhava
vaṁnnuĀcaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍasikoṁ
ḍu (.) naṁmma mēlaṇa paramānugraha
puraḥsaravāgi . sā(ṁ)mrājya māḍabēkeṁ
du barasi koṭa dānasaṁsthe maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī . Ādityacaṁdrāvaniḷōnaḷaśca
dyaurbhūmirāpō hrudayaṁ manaśca
Ahaśca rātriśca Ubhē ca saṁdhyē dharmastu
vṛttaṁ . svadattāputrikā dhāThe remaining lines are lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
